details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

about_item: Pet Carrier: 17.5” L x 11” W x 11” H, Recommended max load of 16 lbs cats small dogs. Please do not choose your carrier based on weight--please reference your pet's length and height in selecting a pet carrier size.
Fits for under-seat dimensions of most airlines. Every airline has a specific set of rules and regulations, please contact with airline before flying with your cats small dogs.

Mesh windows for ventilation, top and side entry with locking zippers for safety. Carrying handles, adjustable shoulder strap which can also be used as seatbelt, and back strap can fasten the pet carrier to your luggage.

Pet carrier comes with a removable base insert, which creates a solid surface for your pet to stand on, along with a removable & hand washable cozy fleece pet bed, which offers a cozy sleeping space for your traveling cats small dogs.
"Toys for pets, of textile materials". Mostly used as a Toy of Fabric Pet Home for pets playing and relaxing.

summary.text: Customers find this pet carrier sturdy enough to carry larger cats and appreciate its roomy design with plenty of space to move around. The carrier is comfortable, easy to travel with, particularly for quick trips to the vet, and features good quality zippers that are easy to use. Customers consider it good value for money, with one noting it exceeds expectations for its price point.

authors_reviews.title: Great pet carrier!
authors_reviews.text: Very nice carrier! My carrier just arrived and I really love how well made it is. The material is soft and it is sturdy with additional support and has enough compartments to store my dog's items. The size is perfect and there is plenty of mesh around the carrier the pet has more than enough breathing room. Great carrier!
authors_reviews.author: Ashley L. Tucker

authors_reviews.title: Good quality and easily storable
authors_reviews.text: Very sturdy and cheap. The quality is good and it isn’t flimsy. The straps are thick so I am not worried about it ripping. Easily folds so you can store it anywhere. My cat weighs 12 lbs and it very long in length and has plenty of room and space.Love that it comes with a small mat. Like how I can see him and he can too so he doesn’t get anxious. Perfect for traveling and vet visits!
authors_reviews.author: Meli MV

authors_reviews.title: Better than the expensive carriers
authors_reviews.text: It's sturdy, you can leave open the side and it won't fall down like others carriers, it has comfortable padding and a leash to secure your pet. Comes with a pocket to keep snacks and water. Compared to other carriers that are more expensive this one is even more spacious and hard. You can open from multiple sides. I ordered this one and another carrier for $65 and kept this cheap one becuase it was better. Sometimes more expensive doesn't mean better.
authors_reviews.author: Yenifer

authors_reviews.title: Nice carrier!
authors_reviews.text: Great price and quality! I purchased one almost two years ago and it has hold very well and fit my cats comfortably. I ended getting new ones since the old one I gifted to my sister who has a slightly bigger cat but it works perfect for vet appointments and short drives.Just be aware, if your pet has an accident inside the carrier the best is to clean it as soon as possible since it can retain the urine odor if not washed properly due to its material.Overall is a great option and my cats love playing or napping in them.
authors_reviews.author: Madelin

authors_reviews.title: Nearly perfect; base pocket not big enough
authors_reviews.text: This is a very light, sturdy, and durable case! Our family moved from a very, VERY old hard shell case when we got new kittens, and this case makes me wonder why it took so long to switch over to this kind of fabric case.There is a downside however. In order to collapse the case to be stored, you have to remove the solid base from the pocket on the bottom. But the opening to the pocket was sewn too small; it took a lot of time and effort to manage to force it in, so removing and reinstalling is not something that is an option for us. It will be stored as is then, which defeats the collapsible option.Nevertheless, everything else looks to be well constructed. No other issues with sewing or piecing, and the removable carpet on the bottom makes cleanup easy. The case also looks very stylish, and provides enough viewing space to keep an eye on your pet.We are also happy with having multiple ways of holding or carrying the case, as well as being able to open it from the top or side. Our old hard shell could only let our cats out the top if we undid over a dozen separate clasps, a task that was time consuming and tedious. And the front grate was rusty and too muscle to open. But this just opens with a zipper.
authors_reviews.author: Shada

authors_reviews.title: Perfect carrier!
authors_reviews.text: Sturdy, well made and perfect for my cat. I love how it opens from the top and sides for whichever you want. Great price for high quality!
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Great Carrier!
authors_reviews.text: This is the third one of these I've bought and could not be happier! I like that there are two ways to open them, depending on how smart your cat is in resisting getting into a cage. They are big enough even for my gigantic orange cat to get him from one place to another. The carpet insert is really nice and cushioned, but I still throw in a blanket for my furballs to keep them comfortable. The zippers are great, and I love that these collapse down when not in use. You CAN stack them - sort of. I have three cats, so I put two cages down low and one on top. Seems to work, but these are not rigid frames. Stacking can be an issue. Overall, though, these are quality carriers that are really worth the buy!
authors_reviews.author: Chase

authors_reviews.title: Great lightweight carrier!
authors_reviews.text: I bought this carrier for trips to the vet and occasional travel, and I’m really impressed for the price. The carrier feels lightweight but still sturdy, and the mesh panels give my cat plenty of airflow so he doesn’t seem as stressed inside.The top and side openings make it much easier to get my cat in and out compared to my old carrier. I especially like that the top zipper opens wide, which helps when my cat decides he doesn’t want to cooperate. The soft bottom pad is also a nice touch and seems comfortable for him.The size (17.5” x 11” x 11”) works well for my medium-sized cat and still fits easily on a car seat. It also folds down nicely when not in use, which saves space.Pros:• Lightweight but holds its shape well• Good ventilation with mesh sides• Easy top and side access• Comfortable removable pad• Great value for the priceOne small thing:If you have a very large cat (15–16 lbs+), you may want to size up.Overall, this is a great budget-friendly carrier that works well for vet visits and short trips. My cat is usually picky about carriers, but he seems much calmer in this one.
authors_reviews.author: Erin B

other_countries_reviews.title: Cat Escaped
other_countries_reviews.text: The very first time I used this carrier, the cat split the zipper and escaped, making for a very dangerous drive. It was absolutely useless.
other_countries_reviews.author: Lindsay Newman

other_countries_reviews.title: Does it’s job
other_countries_reviews.text: I use this on hot days when my cat needs more air. It’s strong enough to hold a 5kg cat. My cat can lay down and so it is purrrfect for after surgery. Lots of room and even fits a cone.
other_countries_reviews.author: ChDk
